scope: keyframed-light shot through the E9 tier ladder with per-frame T3 trust verdicts and a frame-to-frame FLIP temporal-stability check

tier_definitions.final: oidn-denoised cached GATHERLIGHT (single-cache scene; supervision-class reference, Sec. 4.4)

temporal.metric: frame-to-frame FLIP on Reinhard-tonemapped sRGB frames
temporal.baseline_construction: final-tier reference + per-frame independent Gaussian noise at ~30.0 dB per-frame PSNR (flicker per-frame PSNR cannot see)
